title: olotrema gebhardii
intro:
Olotrema gebhardii, also known as the Gebhard's liverwort, is a type of liverwort that belongs to the family Marchantiaceae, a group of non-vascular plants characterized by their flat, leaf-like structure.

It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olotrema gebhardii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever reduction, wound healing, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Olotrema gebhardii can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
